creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Update of port textproc/libvisio fails with:


[...]

configure: error: Required boost headers not found. install boost >= 1.36
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to office@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/usr/ports/textproc/libvisio/work/libvisio-0.0.31/config.log" including the
output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea to
provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

BOOST is installed and has recently been updated:

pkg info -x boost

boost-jam-1.55.0
boost-libs-1.55.0
boost-python-libs-1.55.0
